code:
import io
import string
import list

fn parse_ints(_ line: String) -> List<Int>
  let toks = string.split_whitespace(line)
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  while i < toks.len()
    match toks.get(i)
    when Some(s)
      match string.parse_int(s)
      when Some(n)
        result = list.push(result, n)
      when None
        ()
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  result
end

fn read_line_or_empty() -> String
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
end

let line1 = read_line_or_empty()
let line2 = read_line_or_empty()
let a = parse_ints(line1)
let b = parse_ints(line2)

mut inter: List<Int> = []
mut i = 0
while i < a.len()
  match a.get(i)
  when Some(x)
    if list.contains(b, x) and not list.contains(inter, x)
      inter = list.push(inter, x)
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  i = i + 1
end

mut sorted: List<Int> = []
mut remaining = inter
while remaining.len() > 0
  match list.min(remaining)
  when Some(m)
    sorted = list.push(sorted, m)
    mut new_rem: List<Int> = []
    mut j = 0
    mut removed = false
    while j < remaining.len()
      match remaining.get(j)
      when Some(v)
        if v == m and not removed
          removed = true
        else
          new_rem = list.push(new_rem, v)
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
      j = j + 1
    end
    remaining = new_rem
  when None
    ()
  end
end

if sorted.len() == 0
  println("empty")
else
  mut out = ""
  mut k = 0
  while k < sorted.len()
    match sorted.get(k)
    when Some(v)
      if k == 0
        out = "#{v}"
      else
        out = "#{out} #{v}"
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    k = k + 1
  end
  println(out)
end
